person.name: Maud de Braose
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary: This may be the lady who was imprisoned, along with one of her sons, by King John, and left to starve to death in a dungeon.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Braose於大約1116年出生在英國英格蘭素可布拉波時，她的父親Philip de Braose44歲，母親Eleanor de Totnes33歲。她和Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Braose was born about 1116, in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Philip de Braose, was 44 and her mother, Eleanor de Totnes, was 33. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Braose est née environ 1116, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Philip de Braose, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Totnes, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Braose um 1116 in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip de Braose 44 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Totnes 33. Sie hatte mit Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Braose è nata il circa 1116 nel Bramber, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Philip de Braose, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Eleanor de Totnes, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp.

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Braose(이)가 대략 1116년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 브램버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip de Braose(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Totnes(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Braose nasceu aproximadamente 1116, em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Philip de Braose, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Totnes, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Braose родилась около 1116 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Philip de Braose было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Totnes, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp.
